segments.text: AI has officially entered war. A war that killed Ayatah Ali Kavani, turned Dubai into a ghost town and is now
threatening oil prices worldwide. So the US and Israel launched a joint strike on Iran after a window of opportunity open
to assassinate the Supreme Leader and reportedly the US military used anthropic clot for intelligence assessments, identifying targets and
simulating the battle scenarios. What's even more interesting is this happened right after US Iran nuclear peace talks
in Geneva because Trump will not let Iran go nuclear will never be threatened by a nuclear armed Iran
at any cost. That's why Democrats are calling it a war of choice. Now Iran has hit back launching missiles at US bases
Kuwait, Qatar, UAE, Baharin and is threatening to choke the straight of Hormuz where 20% of the world's oil passes through. So yes, this will hit
your wallet too. But according to international media, the bigger risk is that Russia and China are taking notes. And if America can just start a war,
what stops them from doing the same? Now, this is still a developing story, so we'll keep you updated. But for now,
tell me in the comments what do you guys
